title: HANGERWORLD 20 Peg Blue Plastic Hanging Laundry Socks Lingerie Clothes Portable Indoor Outdoor Airer Dryer
features: 20 peg indoor folding dryer. Ideal for drying socks, underwear baby clothes and other small items. Hooks anywhere in the house - space saving fold flat design. Turquoise blue as shown.
Quality plastic frame. With 20 firm grip spring pegs this hanger will hold lots of small laundry items together for drying.
Great for outdoor drying. easily bring in your small items in one go when it starts raining!!
Large plastic hanging hook. Turquoise blue as shown. Measures 45cm x 29cm when open. Neatly folds away after use to just 9cm in diameter.
Perfect for caravanning, camping and travelling too. New & packaged. Trusted Hangerworld British brand.
description: Product Description Make your laundry day that little bit easier with this clip and dry hanger. Perfect for smalls, underwear, socks, baby clothes and towels, you can clip up to 20 items from this foldable laundry drying rack. With 10 arms and 2 strong spring clips on each arm, you can hang your laundry easily and help your socks dry more quickly. The bright coloured plastic looks great, while the design itself has been perfected by Hangerworld to not rust or break easily. So you can use this clothes drying rack both indoor and outdoor to minimise drying time and utilise the natural drying power of the sun without having to purchase additional drying racks for outdoors. The folding design also makes this a perfect drying rack for camping and travelling, conveniently stows away. Also incredibly useful dryer for baby and toddler clothes, socks and bibs.
